pages.label: Cover and charge
pages.text: RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/009 Defendant: Marcus Vale Court: Central Retail Court === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | Officer MG11 | 5 | CCTV still images | 6-7 | Exhibit list | 8 | Court listing | 9 | Master CCTV footage camera 4 | 10-12 | Listed — export not attached to bundle === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Marcus Vale Statement of Offence: Theft from a shop, contrary to section 1(1) and 7(1) of the Theft Act 1968 Particulars of Offence: On 2 April 2026 stole goods from a convenience store.

pages.label: MG5 (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/009 Officer in case: PC Reid 6610

pages.label: MG5 (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === Headline Summary CCTV still images are served. Master CCTV footage, full export, continuity, audit trail, and recognition/ID  basis are outstanding. Identification from stills alone is not safely confirmed on current papers.

pages.label: MG6C schedule
pages.text: === SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images MV/CCTV/01 — served on bundle. MG6C/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage camera 4 — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export (native format) — referred on MG6C — export not attached. MG6C/CCTV/04 — Continuity and provenance statement — outstanding. MG6C/CCTV/05 — Audit trail / source file hash record — outstanding. MG6C/CCTV/06 — Recognition / ID basis — outstanding — not on bundle.

pages.label: Officer MG11
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — OFFICER STATEMENT (PC Reid 6610) 1. I attended following a report of shop theft. 2. CCTV still images MV/CCTV/01 are served on this bundle. Master footage and full export are NOT served. 3. Stills show a person in relevant aisle. Image quality is limited. I cannot rely on stills alone for positive  identification. Recognition statement and ID basis are NOT on bundle.

pages.label: CCTV stills (1/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: CCTV_STILLS === EXHIBIT MV/CCTV/01 — CCTV STILL IMAGES (served)

pages.label: CCTV stills (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: CCTV_STILLS === Camera 4 — menswear aisle — still frames only. Note: Stills served. Master recording and continuity outstanding per MG6C/CCTV/02–05.

pages.label: Exhibit list
pages.text: === SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Marcus Vale MV/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images — SERVED — pages 6-7 MV/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage — NOT SERVED MV/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export — REFERRED ONLY

pages.label: Listing
pages.text: === SECTION: LISTING === First hearing listed — 22 September 2026, Central Retail Court.

fullText:
RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/009 Defendant: Marcus Vale Court: Central Retail Court === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | Officer MG11 | 5 | CCTV still images | 6-7 | Exhibit list | 8 | Court listing | 9 | Master CCTV footage camera 4 | 10-12 | Listed — export not attached to bundle === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Marcus Vale Statement of Offence: Theft from a shop, contrary to section 1(1) and 7(1) of the Theft Act 1968 Particulars of Offence: On 2 April 2026 stole goods from a convenience store.

=== SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/009 Officer in case: PC Reid 6610

=== SECTION: MG5 === Headline Summary CCTV still images are served. Master CCTV footage, full export, continuity, audit trail, and recognition/ID  basis are outstanding. Identification from stills alone is not safely confirmed on current papers.

=== SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images MV/CCTV/01 — served on bundle. MG6C/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage camera 4 — outstanding — not on bundle. MG6C/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export (native format) — referred on MG6C — export not attached. MG6C/CCTV/04 — Continuity and provenance statement — outstanding. MG6C/CCTV/05 — Audit trail / source file hash record — outstanding. MG6C/CCTV/06 — Recognition / ID basis — outstanding — not on bundle.

=== SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — OFFICER STATEMENT (PC Reid 6610) 1. I attended following a report of shop theft. 2. CCTV still images MV/CCTV/01 are served on this bundle. Master footage and full export are NOT served. 3. Stills show a person in relevant aisle. Image quality is limited. I cannot rely on stills alone for positive  identification. Recognition statement and ID basis are NOT on bundle.

=== SECTION: CCTV_STILLS === EXHIBIT MV/CCTV/01 — CCTV STILL IMAGES (served)

=== SECTION: CCTV_STILLS === Camera 4 — menswear aisle — still frames only. Note: Stills served. Master recording and continuity outstanding per MG6C/CCTV/02–05.

=== SECTION: EXHIBIT_LIST === EXHIBIT LIST — R v Marcus Vale MV/CCTV/01 — CCTV still images — SERVED — pages 6-7 MV/CCTV/02 — Master CCTV footage — NOT SERVED MV/CCTV/03 — Full CCTV export — REFERRED ONLY

=== SECTION: LISTING === First hearing listed — 22 September 2026, Central Retail Court.
